metadata.title: Pounds to Kilograms Converter – lb to kg Calculator
metadata.description: Convert pounds to kilograms instantly. Useful for reading body weight from US apps, gym weights, airline baggage limits and baby weight. Conversion table from 1 to 300 lb.

hero.title: Convert pounds to kilograms
hero.description: Enter any value in pounds and read the result in kilograms immediately. The converter is useful wherever weight is expressed in pounds: in fitness apps from the US, when buying sports equipment, interpreting airline baggage limits, or reading a newborn's weight from English-language medical records.

software.name: Pounds to Kilograms Converter – lb to kg Calculator
alternateName: how many kg is a pound
software.description: Free pounds to kilograms converter that works in your browser without registration. Enter a value in pounds and get the result in kilograms immediately. Useful for reading body weight from US apps, converting gym loads from English-language training programmes, checking baggage limits, or reading a baby's weight from imperial medical records.
featureList: Conversion works both ways — you can convert both pounds to kilograms and kilograms to pounds
The result appears instantly as you type, without clicking any button
The result can be copied to the clipboard with a single click
The conversion table covers values from 1 to 300 lb
The body weight table converts common ranges from 88 to 265 lb to kilograms
The gym weights table converts common loads from 5 to 225 lb to kilograms
All calculations are performed locally in your browser — no data leaves your device
The exact conversion formula is kilograms = pounds × 0.45359237, based on the pound definition from 1959
Works on phone, tablet and desktop without installation

howTo.name: How to convert pounds to kilograms?
howTo.description: Quick guide to using the lb to kg converter.

steps.name: Enter the value in pounds
steps.text: In the left field, enter the number of pounds you want to convert to kilograms. Decimal values such as 150.5 lb are supported.

steps.name: Read the result in kilograms
steps.text: The result in kilograms appears immediately in the field next to it. You can copy it to the clipboard with one click.

steps.name: Reverse the direction if needed
steps.text: Click Swap to switch the converter to kilograms to pounds.

contentBlocks.title: When do you need to convert pounds to kilograms?
contentBlocks.html:
The pound (lb) is the unit of mass in the imperial system, common in the US and still widely used in the UK. In continental Europe and most of the world, the kilogram is the everyday unit, so pounds appear mainly when you use products, apps or information from English-speaking countries.

The most common situations: a fitness app from the US shows your weight goal in pounds, the checked baggage limit is 50 lb, you are buying dumbbells on Amazon US labelled in pounds, or a YouTube training programme tells you to bench 135 lb.

The formula is simple: one pound is exactly 0.45359237 kg. To convert pounds to kilograms, multiply by 0.4536. The converter does this the moment you type a value.

On this page you will find a lb to kg table, a body weight table with conversions of common values, and a gym weights table.
contentBlocks.imageAlt: Free pounds to kilograms converter – Arteon

contentBlocks.title: How does the lb to kg conversion work? Formula and example
contentBlocks.html:
Converting pounds to kilograms is based on a fixed definition: one pound equals exactly 0.45359237 kg. To convert pounds to kilograms, multiply the number of pounds by 0.45359237.

Full formula: kilograms = pounds × 0.4536. The other way: pounds = kilograms × 2.2046.

Example: you want to know how many kilograms 150 lb is (a weight shown in a US app). Calculation: 150 × 0.4536 = 68.04 kg. Another example: a 50 lb baggage limit is 50 × 0.4536 = 22.68 kg.

Quick estimate without a calculator: divide pounds by 2.2. For example: 150 lb ÷ 2.2 ≈ 68.2 kg — the error is less than 0.2%. Another method: multiply by 0.45, which gives an error of less than 0.1%.

contentBlocks.title: Pounds to kilograms conversion table
contentBlocks.description: The table below converts common pound values to kilograms, rounded to two decimal places. To convert an exact value, use the converter above.
contentBlocks.caption: Want to convert the other way? Use our kg to lb converter, which has its own table and detailed content for that direction.

contentBlocks.title: Body weight – common values in pounds converted to kg
contentBlocks.description: The table below converts typical body weight ranges from pounds to kilograms, covering values from 88 lb to 265 lb, which corresponds to approximately 40 kg to 120 kg.

contentBlocks.title: Gym weights – common loads in pounds and kg
contentBlocks.description: Gym equipment made in the US is labelled in pounds. The table below converts standard loads — from light dumbbells to an Olympic barbell and popular powerlifting benchmarks.

contentBlocks.title: When do you typically convert pounds to kilograms?
contentBlocks.description: Converting pounds to kg comes up in several everyday situations.

items.title: Body weight and BMI from US apps
items.description: US fitness apps, BMI calculators from English-language medical sites and diet portals show weight in pounds. If your weight goal is 154 lb, enter 154 in the converter to see that it is 69.85 kg. The body weight table above has ready conversions for common ranges.

items.title: Strength training and YouTube programmes
items.description: Popular US training programmes — Starting Strength, 5/3/1, StrongLifts — list all weights in pounds. 135 lb is about 61 kg, and 'benching 225', the milestone many lifters chase, is just over 102 kg. The gym weights table above covers the most common loads.

items.title: Baggage limits and parcels
items.description: Weight limits on many airlines (especially US carriers) are stated in pounds. 50 lb is 22.68 kg — the standard checked bag limit. When ordering from Amazon US, knowing how much a product weighs in kg helps you estimate shipping costs.

items.title: Baby weight and medical records
items.description: US and UK medical records give a newborn's weight in pounds and ounces. A healthy newborn typically weighs around 7–8 lb (3.2–3.6 kg). One pound is 16 ounces, so 7 lb 11 oz is 7 + 11/16 = 7.6875 lb × 0.4536 = 3.49 kg. The converter works with decimal values — type 7.69 lb to get the approximate result in kg.

contentBlocks.title: Frequently asked questions about converting pounds to kilograms

items.question: How many kilograms is one pound?
items.answer: One pound is exactly 0.45359237 kg. This is a fixed constant, established in 1959 as the international avoirdupois pound. Rounded: 1 lb = 0.454 kg.

items.question: What is the formula to convert pounds to kg?
items.answer: The formula is: kilograms = pounds × 0.45359237. Rounded: kg = lb × 0.4536. For example: 150 lb × 0.4536 = 68.04 kg. The other way: lb = kg × 2.2046.

items.question: How many kg is 150 lb?
items.answer: 150 lb is 68.04 kg. Calculation: 150 × 0.45359 = 68.04. This is a common body weight in the US, frequently quoted in women's health calculators.

items.question: How many kg is 140 lb?
items.answer: 140 lb is 63.50 kg. Calculation: 140 × 0.45359 = 63.50. This is one of the most frequently converted body weight values in US health calculators and training plans.

items.question: How many kg is 180 lb?
items.answer: 180 lb is 81.65 kg. Calculation: 180 × 0.45359 = 81.65. Quick mental check: 180 ÷ 2.2 ≈ 81.8 kg, so the result adds up.

items.question: How many kg is 50 lb?
items.answer: 50 lb is 22.68 kg. This is the standard checked baggage weight limit on many US airlines.

items.question: How many kg is 130 lb?
items.answer: 130 lb is 58.97 kg. Calculation: 130 × 0.45359 = 58.97. Rounded: 130 pounds is just under 59 kg.

items.question: Is 2 pounds equal to 1 kilogram?
items.answer: No — 2 pounds is 0.907 kg, which is more than 9% short of a kilogram. Exactly 1 kg corresponds to 2.2046 lb. The '2 pounds = 1 kg' shortcut can be handy for rough estimates, but the absolute error grows quickly with larger values: 100 lb is not 50 kg but 45.36 kg.

items.question: How can I convert pounds to kilograms without a calculator?
items.answer: Quick method: divide pounds by 2.2. For example: 150 lb ÷ 2.2 ≈ 68.2 kg (exact value: 68.04 kg). The error is less than 0.3%. Another method: multiply by 0.45, giving an error of less than 0.1%.

items.question: How many kg is 135 lb (a bench press benchmark)?
items.answer: 135 lb is 61.24 kg. In gym culture, '135 on the bench' is a popular milestone: a 45 lb barbell plus two 45 lb plates makes exactly 135 lb. The closest metric setup — a 20 kg barbell plus two 20 kg plates — is 60 kg, or 132.3 lb, so slightly less.

items.question: Is a pound the same as an ounce?
items.answer: No — a pound (lb) and an ounce (oz) are two different units. 1 pound = 16 ounces. One ounce is about 28.35 g, and one pound is about 453.6 g (0.4536 kg). Baby weights are often given in pounds and ounces, e.g. '7 lb 11 oz'.

items.question: How many kg is 165 lb?
items.answer: 165 lb is 74.84 kg. Calculation: 165 × 0.45359 = 74.84. Rounded: 165 pounds is just under 75 kg.

items.question: How many kg is 225 lb (a legendary bench press)?
items.answer: 225 lb is 102.06 kg. In gym culture, '225 on the bench' is a symbol of serious strength and a popular training milestone: a 45 lb barbell plus four 45 lb plates (two per side) makes exactly 225 lb. In kilograms that is just over 102 kg.

items.question: What units do Americans and British people use for body weight?
items.answer: Americans state body weight in pounds (lb), while British people commonly use stone and pounds (1 stone = 14 lb), for example '11 stone 4'. Most other countries use kilograms. In medicine, kilograms dominate even in English-speaking countries, because many drug doses are calculated per kilogram of body weight (mg/kg).

items.question: How many pounds is a 23 kg baggage limit?
items.answer: 23 kg is 23 × 2.2046 = 50.71 lb, approximately 50 lb. That is why European airlines often state a 23 kg limit while US carriers say 50 lb — they are almost the same. The difference is 0.71 lb, or about 320 grams.

items.question: How many kg is 60 lb?
items.answer: 60 lb is 27.22 kg. Calculation: 60 × 0.45359 = 27.22. In the US this is also the standard weight of a bag of dry concrete mix, which is why the value often comes up in construction and DIY projects.

contentBlocks.title: Got a question or suggestion?
contentBlocks.description: If you notice an error in the tables or have an idea for improving the converter, write to us. We reply to every message.
